name: Worry Seed
effect: Changes target's ability to Insomnia.

name: Wrap
effect: Traps and damages for 4-5 turns.

name: Wring Out
effect: Power based on target's current HP (up to 120).

name: X-Scissor
effect: Slashes with crossed claws.

name: Yawn
effect: Target falls asleep at the end of the next turn.

name: Zap Cannon
effect: 100% chance to paralyze.

name: Zen Headbutt
effect: 20% chance to flinch.

name: Zing Zap
effect: 30% chance to flinch.
